embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

# 🌊 Wave Points Leaderboard

🥇 **Slax** — `1,987 pts`
🥈 **Tay ur boy** — `429 pts`
🥉 **! Free Drop Maps Bio** — `383 pts`
` 4.` **EXM meandme7634567** — `180 pts`
` 5.` **Sabri** — `107 pts`
` 6.` **Fantastic** — `85 pts`
` 7.` **It’s Dolphin** — `57 pts`
` 8.` **Jo4co Dbzǃ** — `52 pts`
` 9.` **Psychosystems** — `50 pts`
`10.` **lugga** — `46 pts`
`11.` **Numifv!** — `34 pts`
`12.` **𝓛𝓐𝓦𝔁𝓢𝓪𝓿𝓻𝓲𝔁𝓨𝓣乄** — `26 pts`
`13.` **Fruss** — `20 pts`
`14.` **Fahad** — `20 pts`
`15.` **Jay .** — `10 pts`

*Last updated: 2026-05-31 18:10 UTC*

💰 **Daily Interest (Tiered APR)** — Hold **50+ pts** to earn daily interest.
**50+** → 5% • **250+** → 7% • **500+** → 10% • **1000+** → 15%
Paid out automatically once the next whole point is reached. Use `>wavepoints` to check your accrual.

embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s
